symptoms.symptom_name: Severe burning pain in the groin and abdominal skin folds

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Intense localised burning is typical of inflamed, macerated candidal intertrigo; severity here is driven by fissuring.

symptoms.symptom_name: Preceding intense pruritus progressing to burning over 12 hours

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Itch preceding an inflammatory flare is characteristic of a cutaneous fungal process.

symptoms.symptom_name: Maceration with deep linear bleeding fissures at the base of the folds

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Deep fissuring of chronically moist occluded folds indicates advanced intertrigo and creates a portal for secondary bacterial infection.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Bacterial cellulitis of the skin folds
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Bleeding fissures are an entry point for secondary bacterial infection; the true fissure depth needs in-person assessment.

symptoms.symptom_name: Satellite papules and pustules beyond the advancing border of the erythema

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Satellite lesions beyond the main border are highly characteristic of cutaneous candidiasis and distinguish it from irritant dermatitis and cellulitis.
Pure irritant dermatitis does not produce satellite pustules.

symptoms.symptom_name: White curd-like exudate with malodour in the deepest creases

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Curd-like exudate is characteristic of candidal overgrowth; malodour raises the possibility of secondary bacterial colonisation.

symptoms.symptom_name: Beefy-red, well-demarcated intertriginous erythema without deep induration

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Beefy-red confluent erythema of the folds is typical of candidal intertrigo.

diagnostic_weight_edges.diagnosis: Bacterial cellulitis of the skin folds
diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: The superficial erythema lacks the deep, tender induration of frank cellulitis — but induration can only be reliably assessed by palpation in person.

symptoms.symptom_name: Recent broad-spectrum antibiotic course for a urinary tract infection

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Broad-spectrum antibiotics suppress commensal bacteria and predispose to candidal overgrowth — the proximate driver in this case.

symptoms.symptom_name: Immobility, occlusion, friction and incontinence-related moisture in the folds

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Warm, moist, occluded, friction-exposed folds are the classic environment for candidal intertrigo and perpetuate it.

symptoms.symptom_name: Afebrile with stable observations (no systemic sepsis features)

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Absence of fever, tachycardia beyond baseline, hypotension or toxicity argues against established systemic sepsis at present — but does not exclude early deep infection.

symptoms.symptom_name: No rapidly spreading erythema, necrosis, or deep induration on inspection now

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Negative screen for the catastrophic mimic supports same-day in-person management rather than emergency transfer, but reliable exclusion needs in-person examination.

symptoms.symptom_name: Skin swab / wound culture of the folds

investigation_details.investigation_name: Skin swab for microscopy and culture (fungal + bacterial)
investigation_details.expected_result: Candida on microscopy/culture; possible secondary bacterial growth
investigation_details.if_not_ordered_consequence: Usually managed clinically; a swab is reserved for refractory disease or suspected secondary bacterial infection and is not obtainable via telehealth.

diagnostic_weight_edges.evidence_basis: Confirms the organism and any secondary pathogen; a clinician-obtained investigation, never available in telehealth in real time.

symptom_clusters.clinical_significance: Satellite papulopustules + curd-like exudate + beefy-red flexural erythema on a background of recent broad-spectrum antibiotics and moist occluded folds is together strongly characteristic of candidal intertrigo.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: In-person dermatological examination of the skin folds (inspect fissure depth, palpate for induration, exclude cellulitis)
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Same-day in-person examination is the pivotal step — it confirms the diagnosis, assesses fissure depth and excludes secondary bacterial cellulitis, which cannot be done on video.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Skin swab for fungal and bacterial microscopy/culture
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Not first-line; reserve for refractory disease or if secondary bacterial infection is suspected on in-person examination.

investigation_recommendations_expected.investigation_name: Routine bloods / inflammatory markers or blood cultures
investigation_recommendations_expected.rationale: Not indicated while the patient is afebrile and systemically well; would be driven by the in-person assessment if sepsis features emerge, not ordered reflexively from telehealth.
